REF250.2.desc: The REF 250.2 is a 2-channel Class AB amplifier at the top of Zapco's Reference Series, engineered for sonic purity with hand-selected internal components, audiophile-grade capacitors, and upgradable op-amps.
narr: ELNA Series RA3/RFS signal-path capacitors with SAMXON power supply caps
Balanced/unbalanced input selectable via internal button
Upgradable op-amps — MUSES8820 standard; socket-mounted for easy swap to MUSES02

REF150.4.desc: The REF 150.4 is a 4-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Reference Series, designed to drive high-end speakers with selected audiophile components and an upgradable op-amp stage.
narr: ELNA Series RA3/RFS signal-path capacitors with SAMXON power supply caps
Balanced/unbalanced input selectable via internal button
Upgradable op-amps — MUSES8820 standard; socket-mounted for easy swap to MUSES02

REF150.6.desc: The REF 150.6 is a 6-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Reference Series, able to power a complete front and rear stage with one unit, built from the same audiophile-grade components as its siblings.
narr: ELNA Series RA3/RFS signal-path capacitors with SAMXON power supply caps
Balanced/unbalanced input selectable via internal button
Upgradable op-amps — MUSES8820 standard; socket-mounted for easy swap to MUSES02

REF500.1.desc: The REF 500.1 is a mono Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Reference Series, delivering authoritative bass with the same audiophile component selection and upgradable op-amps found across the Reference line.
narr: ELNA Series RA3/RFS signal-path capacitors with SAMXON power supply caps
Balanced/unbalanced input selectable via internal button
Upgradable op-amps — MUSES8820 standard; socket-mounted for easy swap to MUSES02

ST-2B.desc: The ST-2B is a 2-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's ST-B Series, bringing Zapco's 40-year heritage of sound quality and reliability to an everyday amplifier everyone can afford.
narr: Stable into 4 Ω bridged or 2 Ω stereo load
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-4B.desc: The ST-4B is a 4-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's ST-B Series, engineered for great everyday sound with MOSFET power supply and a full suite of onboard crossover controls.
narr: Stable into 4 Ω bridged or 2 Ω stereo load
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-5B.desc: The ST-5B is a 5-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's ST-B Series, combining four full-range channels with a high-power mono subwoofer channel to deliver a complete system in one compact unit.
narr: Stable into 4 Ω bridged or 2 Ω stereo load
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-1B.desc: The ST-1B is a mono Class AB amplifier in Zapco's ST-B Series, offering dedicated subwoofer power with a subsonic filter, phase control, and variable LP crossover at an accessible price.

ST-2XPSQIII.desc: The ST-2XP SQ III is a 2-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III SQ Series, with a high-efficiency finned chassis, temperature-controlled fans, and audiophile-grade capacitors for all-day performance.
narr: New high-efficiency finned chassis with temperature-controlled fans
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-4XSQIII.desc: The ST-4X SQ III is a 4-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III SQ Series, designed as a compact, high-efficiency amp for full-range listening.
narr: New high-efficiency finned chassis with temperature-controlled fans
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-4XPSQIII.desc: The ST-4XP SQ III is a high-power 4-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III SQ Series, delivering 150 W per channel into 4 Ω with audiophile-grade components.
narr: New high-efficiency finned chassis with temperature-controlled fans
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-6XSQIII.desc: The ST-6X SQ III is a b-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III SQ Series, able to power a complete three-way front stage with 100 W per channel into 4 Ω.
narr: New high-efficiency finned chassis with temperature-controlled fans
Variable Full / LP / HP electronic crossover

ST-500XMIII.desc: The ST-500XM III is a mono Class D bass amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III Series, delivering up to 400 W RMS at 1 Ω with variable bass boost, subsonic filter, and strappable design for doubled power.
narr: 1 Ω stable — strapable with a second amp for up to 800 W at 1 Ω

ST-1000XMIII.desc: The ST-1000XM III is a mono Class D bass amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III Series, rated at 1,000 W RMS at 1 Ω and strapable for up to 2,000 W, with full bass management controls.
narr: 1 Ω stable — strapable with a second amp for up to 2,000 W at 1 Ω

ST-1500XMIII.desc: The ST-1500XM III is a mono Class D bass amplifier in Zapco's Studio-X III Series, delivering 1,600 W at 1 Ω with strapable design for up to 3,200 W, purpose-built for serious subwoofer applications.
narr: 1 Ω stable — strapable with a second amp for up to 3,200 W at 1 Ω

ST-2000XMIII.desc: The ST-2000XM III is Zapco's flagship mono Class D bass amplifier in the Studio-X III Series, rated at 2,000 W RMS at 1 Ω and strapable to 4,000 W — the maximum bass power in the Studio-X lineup.
narr: 1 Ω stable — strapable with a second amp for up to 4,000 W at 1 Ω

Z-150.2II.desc: The Z-150.2 II is a 2-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Z-II Competition Series, featuring audiophile-grade capacitors, a new TI op-amp for class-leading signal-to-noise, and improved Tiffany-style RCA connectors.
narr: New TI op-amp for a lower noise floor and better S/N ratio
Audiophile-grade capacitors shared with the Z-LX and Z-SP Series
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

Z-150.4II.desc: The Z-150.4 II is a 4-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Z-II Competition Series, engineered with audiophile-grade components and a reinforced power supply to elevate sound quality in any multi-channel system.
narr: New TI op-amp for a lower noise floor and better S/N ratio
Audiophile-grade capacitors shared with the Z-LX and Z-SP Series
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

Z-150.6II.desc: The Z-150.6 II is a b-channel Class AB amplifier in Zapco's Z-II Competition Series, able to drive a full three-way active stage with 165 W per channel and competition-grade build quality.
narr: New TI op-amp for a lower noise floor and better S/N ratio
Audiophile-grade capacitors shared with the Z-LX and Z-SP Series
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

Z-1KDII.desc: The Z-1KD II is a mono Class D bass amplifier in Zapco's Z-II Competition Series, offering up to 1,050 W at 1 Ω with audiophile-grade capacitors and low-noise TI op-amps inherited from the SQ lineup.
narr: 1 Ω stable; strapable (Linked) for 1,800 W into 2 Ω
New high-end audio capacitors from the SQ amplifier line
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

Z-2KDII.desc: The Z-2KD II is a high-power mono Class D bass amplifier in Zapco's Z-II Competition Series, delivering 2,100 W at 1 Ω and strapable to 3,600 W for extreme competition bass builds.
narr: 1 Ω stable; strapable (Linked) for 3,600 W into 2 Ω
New high-end audio capacitors from the SQ amplifier line
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

Z-3KDII.desc: The Z-3KD II is Zapco's largest mono Class D bass amplifier in the Z-II Competition Series, rated at 3,000 W at 1 Ω with strapable output up to 6,000 W for the most demanding competition and SPL applications.
narr: 1 Ω stable; strapable (Linked) for 6,000 W into 2 Ω
New high-end audio capacitors from the SQ amplifier line
Metal pots and switches with 40-position detents

ST-104DSQIII.desc: The ST-104D SQ III is a 4-channel Class D amplifier in Zapco's ST-D Compact Series, delivering 100 W per channel into 4 Ω from a chassis just 12.4 cm wide.
narr: Low-Pass and High-Pass filter: 30 Hz – 3 kHz
sections: RCA low-level (10 kΩ) and speaker-level (50 Ω)

ST-105D.desc: The ST-105D is a 5-channel Class D amplifier in Zapco's ST-D Compact Series, combining four full-range channels with a dedicated 200 W mono subwoofer channel in one palm-sized 12.4 cm chassis.
narr: LP / HP / Flat filter switchable (35 Hz – 250 Hz)
Separate gain control per channel group

ST-750D.desc: The ST-750D is a mono Class D subwoofer amplifier in Zapco's ST-D Compact Series, pumping 750 W into 2 Ω from the same compact 12.4 cm chassis shared across the ST-D Compact line.
sections: RCA low-level (10 kΩ) and speaker-level (50 Ω)

intro: Conceived to replace the Studio Series, the first Reference Series amplifier range was completed in 2001 — Zapco's first attempt to bring the qualities that built the Zapco legend to a line of amplifiers accessible to all. The response exceeded the company's wildest expectations.

The Reference Series was created not simply to offer an accessible amplifier, but the best amplifier in its price range — models in 1, 2, 4, and 6 channels with a classy design and selected internal components. Positioned a step above the Z-AP Series, these amps use higher-performance components to deliver listening quality as good as, or better than, other companies' most expensive amplifiers.

Zapco has a reputation for sound reproduction and quality that is unsurpassed. It is our dedication to sonic purity and our passion for performance that built that reputation — just check the audio competition scene and the forums; the pros know what to use to win.

But not everyone wants to compete. Could Zapco put its 40 years of audio experience to work to develop an amp for everyday use — one that all can afford but that stays true to the Zapco heritage for sound and reliability? Absolutely. With the Studio-B amplifiers, Zapco brings the sound quality and reliability that built the legend to an amplifier everyone can afford.

Everyone wants great sound in their car, but not everyone wants to compete in sound-offs. Zapco put its 40+ years of experience to work and developed a line of amplifiers that everyone could afford — lightweight, compact, and true to Zapco's heritage. The Studio-X SQ III series adds a new high-efficiency finned chassis with temperature-controlled fans so your amplifier plays all day long without overheating.

The Studio-X SQ III Class AB amps deliver less than 0.05% THD+noise and over 95 dB signal-to-noise. The Studio-X Class D mono bass amps cover 400 W to 2,000 W RMS — all 1 Ω stable and strapable together to double power, giving you from 400 W to 4,000 W in a compact, affordable package.

In 2012 Zapco introduced the Z-Series of SQ amps, conceived not so much by engineers as by audiophiles and car-sound fanatics around the world who had been modifying Zapco amplifiers internally to achieve better sound. The Z-Series was the result of that unique development method.

The Z-II brings the Z-Series into a new era: a new TI op-amp for a lower noise floor and better signal-to-noise, audiophile-grade capacitors from the LX and SP amps, a beefed-up power supply with more storage and lower inductance, improved Tiffany-style RCA connectors, recessed end plates, and metal pots with 40-position detents for accurate multi-amp gain matching.

Over the last years Zapco has introduced more than pure high-end SQ competition amps — also a line of great-sounding, affordable amps called the Studio series. The Studio-D amps are full-range Class-D amps with great sound, a compact chassis, and crystal-clear power.

The ST-D Compact Series takes compactness further: chassis dimensions reduced to just 12.4 cm (W) × 5 cm (H). And no compromise on power — the ST-104D SQ III delivers up to 4 × 100 W into 4 Ω, the ST-105D adds a dedicated mono sub channel, and the ST-750D pumps 750 W mono. You no longer have to choose between sound quality, power, and available space.
